nodes.context: Clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Platì, Calabria, active in drug trafficking and other crimes.
Criminal and mafia-type organisation in Calabria, Italy.
'Ndrangheta clan, collaborator with Sergi 'ndrina in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: On 20 May 2008, an anti-drug operation led to 48 pre-trial detention orders against alleged members of the Cataldo 'ndrina from Locri, who were supplied with cocaine by the Sergi and Marando 'ndrine
